styles.css: :host{display:block}.app{position:relative;width:100vw;height:100vh;overflow:hidden;background:#dbe7f2;color:#162033;font-family:system-ui,sans-serif}.mapPane{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:1}.geo-map{position:absolute;inset:0;background:#cfe0ee}.sheet{position:absolute;left:16px;top:16px;bottom:16px;width:min(440px,calc(100vw - 32px));z-index:10;display:grid;grid-template-rows:auto minmax(0,1fr);background:rgba(255,255,255,.96);border:1px solid #d9e2ef;border-radius:22px;box-shadow:0 18px 46px rgba(15,23,42,.25);overflow:hidden}.sheetHead{padding:14px;border-bottom:1px solid #d9e2ef}.title{display:block;font-size:18px;font-weight:950}.sub{display:block;margin-top:4px;color:#64748b;font-size:12px}.body{overflow:auto;padding:12px 14px 18px}.stack{display:grid;gap:10px}.row{display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}.card{border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:16px;background:#fff;padding:12px}.detail{border-color:#8b5cf6;background:#fbfaff}.name{font-weight:950;font-size:13px}.muted{color:#64748b;font-size:11px}.pill{display:inline-flex;min-height:24px;padding:0 8px;align-items:center;border-radius:999px;background:#f8fafc;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;font-size:11px;font-weight:900}.legend{position:absolute;right:16px;top:16px;z-index:12;background:rgba(255,255,255,.95);border:1px solid #d9e2ef;border-radius:16px;padding:10px 12px;font-size:12px}button{font:inherit;min-height:30px;border:1px solid #d9e2ef;border-radius:999px;background:#111827;color:white;padding:0 10px;font-size:12px;font-weight:900}.leaflet-container{position:absolute;inset:0;overflow:hidden;background:#b9d1e8}@media(max-width:760px){.sheet{top:auto;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;width:auto;height:42vh;border-radius:22px 22px 0 0}.legend{display:none}}

children.text: Leaflet is isolated inside GeoMapPort. SDUI owns map and sheet placement.
